raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Current California law mandates a sentence of death or life without the possibility of parole for anyone convicted of 'murder with special circumstances,' even if the person did not kill anyone, nor intend for anyone to die.",
    "Under current law, if a person dies during the course of certain felonies, those involved in the felony are subject to severe punishments regardless of their role in the person’s death or their intent.",
    "The Sentencing Reform Act of 2021 (SB 300) will restore discretion to judges in felony murder cases.",
    "SB 300 will disallow individuals from being sentenced to death or life without the possibility of parole when they did not directly perpetrate a death, did not aid or abet a killing, and had no intent to kill.",
    "Senator Nancy Skinner's SB 1437 reserves murder charges and punishment to those that actually commit murder in most cases.",
    "SB 1437 allows those convicted the opportunity to be resentenced to a lower sentence.",
    "Approximately 72% of women serving life under the felony murder rule did not commit murder.",
    "Eighty percent of people serving life without parole (LWOP) sentences are people of color, and nearly 70% are Black or Latinx.",
    "The racial disparity in sentencing outcomes suggests that the felony murder special circumstance law has racist implications.",
    "The average age at the time of the offense for which a life without parole sentence is imposed due to a special circumstance finding is 19.",
    "There are currently over 5,234 people in California serving life without parole sentences, with 2,303 of whom were 25 years or younger at the time of the offense.",
    "California taxpayers pay an average of $112,600 per year to incarcerate a young and healthy person and over $150,000 for an older person serving LWOP.",
    "Eighty-eight percent of people serving life without parole sentences have been determined to be the lowest possible score on the California Department of Corrections risk assessment scale."
  ]
}
```
